_comment: Ручные правки статов карт. Используется когда HearthstoneJSON недоступен.
_comment3: Поля: tier, attack, health, text, mechanics, race

Aureate Laureate.text: After you play a Dragon, give it Divine Shield.

Bubble Gunner.text: After a friendly Mech gains Divine Shield, give it +1 Attack.

Cord Puller.text: After you Magnetize a minion, get a copy of it.

Deep-Sea Angler.text: After you summon a Murloc, give a random friendly Murloc +1/+2.

Dozy Whelp.text: Start of Combat: Gain +1 Attack for each friendly Dragon.

Dune Dweller.text: After you play an Elemental, gain +1/+1.

Flighty Scout.text: After you play a Battlecry minion, give a random friendly Beast +1/+1.

Lullabot.text: At the end of your turn, give a random friendly minion +1 Health.

Manasaber.text: After you upgrade your Tavern, give your minions +1/+1.

Misfit Dragonling.text: Battlecry: Gain +1/+1 for each Dragon you've bought this game.

Molten Rock.text: Taunt. After you play an Elemental, gain +1 Health.

Ominous Seer.text: Battlecry: Get a random Tavern spell that costs (1).

Passenger.text: Whenever you buy a minion, gain +1 Attack.

Picky Eater.text: Battlecry: Consume a minion in the Tavern to gain its stats.

Wrath Weaver.text: After you play a Demon, gain +2 Attack. Your hero takes 1 damage.

Groundbreaker.text: Also damages the minions next to whichever minion this attacks.
